Production Hub — First Time Setup
🗄 Supabase Database
Supabase → Settings → API → anon public key
🤖 OpenAI (GPT-4o)
platform.openai.com/api-keys — stored in your browser only
Supabase (free shared database)
1. Go to supabase.com → New project
2. SQL Editor → run:
create table kpi_days (id text primary key, data jsonb, updated_at timestamptz default now()); 3. Settings → API → copy Project URL and anon key

OpenAI (image scanning)
1. Go to platform.openai.com/api-keys
2. Click "Get API key" → "Create API key" → copy it

Engineering Downtime by Machine (input)
New format: enter total engineering downtime for the hour in DT Eng, then use the Machine DT Breakdown column to log up to 3 affected machines and their attributable minutes. Historical data is auto-backfilled from notes where possible.
